sources.title: Proteoform_ID_Tel2.xlsx
sources.role: released telencephalon region table used for exact-ID overlap, duplicate-incidence sensitivity, abundance-normalization checks, and marker-family traceability

sources.title: proteoform_ID_Teo2.xlsx
sources.role: released optic-tectum region table used for exact-ID overlap, duplicate-incidence sensitivity, abundance-normalization checks, and marker-family traceability

sources.title: Supporting Information workbook
sources.role: journal supplementary workbook containing a note sheet with TopPIC and TopDiff processing details plus Teo2 and Tel2 table copies that match the standalone PRIDE XLSX files

sources.title: An improved nonparametric lower bound of species richness via a modified Good-Turing frequency formula
sources.role: background on higher-order unseen-richness estimators that are not identifiable from the released duplicate-only zebrafish tables

sources.title: Jaccard/Tanimoto similarity test and estimation methods for biological presence-absence data
sources.role: prevalence-adjusted overlap-significance framework used to show that the telencephalon/optic-tectum overlap remains far below the fixed-margin independence baseline

sources.title: Characterization of neural stem cells and their progeny in the adult zebrafish optic tectum
sources.role: independent optic-tectum radial-glia marker source for GFAP, FABP7a, and S100B

sources.title: Proteome Profile of Myelin in the Zebrafish Brain
sources.journal: Frontiers in Cell and Developmental Biology
sources.role: independent adult zebrafish CNS myelin marker source for PLP1b, MBP, and MPZ/P0

sources.title: Forebrain control of behaviorally-driven social orienting in zebrafish
sources.role: adult telencephalon functional context

sources.title: A single-cell transcriptome atlas of the maturing zebrafish telencephalon
sources.role: adult telencephalon specialization context

sources.title: Visuomotor behaviors in larval zebrafish after GFP-guided laser ablation of the optic tectum
sources.role: optic tectum visuomotor context

sources.title: The Cellular Organization of Zebrafish Visuomotor Circuits
sources.role: optic tectum and visuomotor circuit context

sources.title: Learning and memory formation in zebrafish: Protein dynamics and molecular tools
sources.journal: Frontiers in Cell and Developmental Biology
sources.role: memory and telencephalic functional background

sources.title: Top-Down Proteomics Study of Aging and Sexual Dimorphism of Zebrafish Brains

sources.title: A Foundation Model for Spatial Proteomics
sources.role: broader spatial-proteomics foundation-model context

sources.title: HEIST: A Graph Foundation Model for Spatial Transcriptomics and Proteomics Data
sources.role: broader spatial multi-omics foundation-model context

sources.title: Normalization of peak intensities in bottom-up MS-based proteomics using singular value decomposition
sources.role: EigenMS normalization context for why richer bias-removal models need broader replication than the released zebrafish duplicate tables provide

sources.title: Normalization and missing value imputation for label-free LC-MS analysis
sources.role: normalization and missing-value context for the discussion of why this note uses no-imputation sensitivity checks rather than model-heavy completion

sources.title: Accounting for the Multiple Natures of Missing Values in Label-Free Quantitative Proteomics Data Sets to Compare Imputation Strategies
sources.role: missingness-mechanism context supporting the paper's caution that public-table zeros are absent detections, not necessarily biological zero abundance
